evals.name: full-agent-with-description
evals.prompt: Create an agent called security-reviewer that reviews code for OWASP vulnerabilities
evals.expected_output: Complete agent.md with frontmatter (name, description with trigger conditions, model, tools), system prompt with bounded scope, process steps, output format, constraints, and reasoning discipline.
expectations: Frontmatter has name, description, model, and tools fields
Description states WHEN to spawn (trigger conditions), not just WHAT it does
Tools are explicitly listed following principle of least privilege
System prompt is self-sufficient (no references to parent context)
Output format defined in a code block or table
Constraints section has at least 1 negative boundary

evals.name: interview-mode
evals.expected_output: Enters interview mode asking 3 questions: what it analyzes/produces, read-only vs read-write, complexity level.
expectations: Asks what the agent should analyze or produce
Asks whether it should modify files or only read/report
Asks about complexity level for model selection
Does not generate a complete agent from the name alone

evals.name: false-positive-not-agent
evals.prompt: Write a function to validate email addresses
evals.expected_output: Does not create an agent. This is a coding task.
expectations: Recognizes this as a coding request

evals.name: task-better-served-by-alternative
evals.prompt: Create an agent that always formats my output as markdown tables
evals.expected_output: Suggests an output style or CLAUDE.md rule instead of an agent, per the 'When NOT to create an agent' table.
expectations: Identifies this as a formatting task, not an agent task
Suggests output style or CLAUDE.md rule as the better alternative
Explains why an agent is overkill for this use case

evals.name: name-collision-detection
evals.prompt: Create an agent called Explore that searches codebases
evals.expected_output: Rejects the name 'Explore' because it collides with a built-in agent. Suggests an alternative name.
expectations: Detects collision with built-in agent name 'Explore'
Does not create the agent with the colliding name
